abilities.description: Your raven heeds your call. When you make @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.3f5a834fa3fea5d1]{Gain Ground}, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.e6ed148eff82c171]{Face Danger} using your sly raven to perform trickery (such as creating a distraction or stealing a small object) add +2 and take +1 momentum on a hit.

Your raven is diligent and may carry messages for you. You may @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.a2d7793b23c17489]{Secure an Advantage}, @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.13b2d777c6fb719d]{Gather Information}, or @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.9f538fabf8998c5b]{Compel} from a distance using them. If you do, take +2 momentum on a hit.

When you @Compendium[foundry-ironsworn.starforgedmoves.Item.0cfcd6fbaf6135d0]{Face Death}, your raven manifests themselves as a knowing creature, add +their health. On a strong hit, mark 1 tick on your bonds legacy track.
